mnemonics.title: PIM
mnemonics.content: Pass by IMage - Picture Java passing a copy of a photo (reference) or a copy of a number (primitive), not the original object or variable itself.

mnemonics.title: CARE
mnemonics.content: Copies Are Received Everywhere - Java is always pass-by-value, so a copy of the value is passed to a method, whether it's a primitive type or a reference.

mnemonics.title: PRIM
mnemonics.content: Primitive References In Methods - For primitive types, the method gets a copy of the actual data value, while for reference types, the method gets a copy of the memory address (reference).
